records.question: Which drivers are assigned to school buses that are exactly full-time?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where school_bus.if_full_time = 'full-time' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find drivers whose school bus assignments are marked as exactly full-time. This requires joining driver and school_bus, and filtering on If_full_time = 'full-time'.

records.question: Which drivers named Douglas McCrory, who are at least 36 years old, live in Hartford, belong to the Dem party, and drive full-time school buses with exactly 8 years of experience?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.years_working = 8 AND driver.age >= 36 AND driver.name = 'Douglas McCrory' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(driver.name) = 'douglas mccrory' and driver.age >= 36 and lower(driver.home_city) = 'hartford' and lower(driver.party) = 'dem' and school_bus.if_full_time = 1 and school_bus.years_working = 8 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter drivers by name, age, home city, party, and join with school_bus to check for full-time status and exactly 8 years of experience.

records.question: Which drivers who live in East Hartford, are Democrats, and drive full-time school buses work with schools?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE driver.home_city = 'East Hartford' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(driver.home_city) like '%east hartford%' and lower(driver.party) like '%democrat%' and lower(school_bus.if_full_time) = 'yes' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find drivers whose Home_city is East Hartford, Party is Democrat, and who drive full-time school buses (If_full_time = 'Yes'), and who are associated with any school via school_bus.

records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(driver.party) like '%dem%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find drivers who are associated with school buses and whose party is 'Dem'. This requires joining driver and school_bus, and filtering by party.

records.question: Which drivers named Minnie Gonzalez, aged at least 46 and living in Hartford, work full-time driving school buses for no more than 3 years at private schools with grades 5th-12th grade?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE driver.name = 'Minnie Gonzalez' AND driver.age >= 46 AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND school_bus.years_working <= 3 AND school.grade = '5th-12th grade' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND school.type = 'Private'

records.question: Which drivers aged at least 46 have been working exactly 3 years as full-time school bus drivers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND school_bus.years_working = 3 AND driver.age >= 46
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where driver.age >= 46 and school_bus.years_working = 3 and school_bus.if_full_time = 'yes' limit 5;
records.thought: We need drivers aged at least 46 who have worked exactly 3 years as full-time school bus drivers. This requires joining driver and school_bus, filtering by age, years_working, and if_full_time.
